changeSet.author: kilo-code
changeSet.comment: Create data_source table — must be first, all other tables reference it
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS data_source CASCADE;

changeSet.author: kilo-code
changeSet.comment: Create reference tables: document_type, organization, jurisdiction, region, topic

changeSet.author: kilo-code
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS document_section CASCADE; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS document CASCADE;

changeSet.author: kilo-code
changeSet.comment: Create M:N junction tables: document_organization, document_topic
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS document_topic CASCADE; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS document_organization CASCADE;

changeSet.author: kilo-code
changeSet.comment: Create change tracking tables: document_section_modification, document_revocation
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS document_revocation CASCADE; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS document_section_modification CASCADE;

changeSet.author: kilo-code
changeSet.comment: Create rubric table (hierarchical, universal — not tied to any data source)
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS rubric CASCADE;

changeSet.author: kilo-code
changeSet.comment: Create document_rubric M:N junction table linking documents to rubrics
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS document_rubric CASCADE;
